# Quiz External Material Rules

- `.vs/` and `.vscode/` are editor state/templates moved out of `apps/quiz`.
- `dependencies/` contains moved dependency installs such as `node_modules`.
- `quiz-data/` is the external deck data Git repository used by the apps.
- `figma-make/` is an external browser/Figma export, not canonical app source.
- `legacy/` preserves old copies and leftovers.
- `git-metadata/` preserves moved nested Git metadata.
- Build outputs belong in `../../out/quiz/`, not here.
